name: Richard Stallman
why:
A man who tried to free the internet.
He is the founder of the Free Software Foundation and the GNU Project.

name: Dennis Ritchie
why: The co-creator of the Unix operating system and the C programming language.

name: Linus Torvalds
why:
The creator of the Linux kernel.
He is the one who started the development of the Linux kernel.

name: Gabe Newell
why:
The co-founder of Valve Corporation.
He is the one who created the Steam platform.
